text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I spot Tamamo Cross before she starts training. I
think I hear her sniffling, though...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Ack! What da heck are you doin' here?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
O-oh... this snifflin' is uh—I got hay fever! What
else could it be?! Ya never heard of allergies?
choice_data_list: And what's that in your hand?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Uh, this? Just some regular ol' tissue paper.
Y'know, for wipin' the ol' sniffer...
choice_data_list: Want me to toss it away for you?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: No, ya dolt! Just see what happens if ya do!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Nothin' gets past you, huh! I was just readin' a fan
letter's all!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
"Whenever I see you zipping past the bigger
racers like lightning..."

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
"It gives me courage." That's what they said.
Readin' this stuff gives me the fuzzies...
